name: IDS France SAS
summary: IDS France SAS operates as a services company for the development of geographic information. It provides production and validation of spatial data and geographic information systems, including collection of field data and creation of geographical references through software tools and interface with information systems and customer relationship management. The company is involved in the creation and installation of geographical data bases primarily for geomarketing, transportation network management, 3D geographical data manipulation, and real-time data processing applications; and supply of computer equipment and services for installing and monitoring information systems. It also designs Internet software and solutions for processing, exchanging, and distributing information via Internet and Intranet. IDS France SAS was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Lyon, France.
